untranslatable_reason: Signal requires subjective multi-method weighting (Elliott Wave, Gann, Fibonacci, cycles, sentiment, charts) with dynamic regime-based allocation and 'gut-feel interpretation'. These qualitative, non-mechanical components cannot be expressed as rigid quantitative rules. Only trend-following (MA/ADX) and oscillator selection logic can be approximated mechanically.
translation_notes: Attempted mechanical proxy: Used ADX_14 as regime detector (high ADX for trending, low for ranging) combined with price vs SMA_50 to establish direction. This captures only the moving average and oscillator weighting concept. The signal's core requirement—dynamic expert judgment across 7+ methods including subjective interpretation—is fundamentally incompatible with deterministic rule-based backtesting. Recommend: (1) Use this as entry framework only, (2) Accept that backtest will underperform live signal due to removed discretion, (3) Consider separate regime classifier if available.
